title: Kent Miller
compiled_truth: Kent Miller is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-30 to 2002-02-08), Kent Miller sent 20 and received 454 emails, totalling 474 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dave Neubauer](people/dave-neubauer) (10), [Danny Mccarty](people/danny-mccarty) (9), [Sue Neville](people/sue-neville) (6), [Drew Fossum](people/drew-fossum) (5), [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (5).
